questions.question: The weather _____ beautiful on our holiday.
questions.explanation: The weather = It, ngôi thứ ba số ít → was.

questions.question: We _____ surprised by the news.
questions.explanation: We → were. Chủ ngữ số nhiều dùng were.

questions.question: She _____ nervous before the exam.
questions.explanation: She → was. Chủ ngữ ngôi thứ ba số ít dùng was.

questions.question: I _____ exhausted after the long trip.
questions.explanation: I → was. Chủ ngữ I dùng was.

questions.question: The food _____ delicious but the service _____ slow.
questions.explanation: The food (It) → was; the service (It) → was.

questions.question: We _____ ready when they arrived. (phủ định)
questions.explanation: We + weren't. Phủ định của were là weren't.

questions.question: He _____ upset when he heard the bad news.
questions.explanation: He → was.

questions.question: _____ the movie good? → Yes, it _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi: Was + It (the movie)? → Yes, it was.

questions.question: _____ you at the party? → No, I _____.
questions.explanation: Were + you? → No, I wasn't. (I dùng was/wasn't)

questions.question: Where _____ you yesterday?
questions.explanation: Where + were + you? Hỏi địa điểm trong quá khứ.

questions.question: The market _____ very crowded on Sunday.
questions.explanation: The market = It, ngôi thứ ba số ít → was.

questions.question: They _____ all together for the celebration.
questions.explanation: They → were.

questions.question: Từ 'exhausted' nghĩa là gì?
questions.explanation: 'Exhausted' có nghĩa là kiệt sức, mệt lả.

questions.question: Her parents _____ proud of her results.
questions.explanation: Her parents = They → were.

questions.question: He _____ available yesterday afternoon. (phủ định)
questions.explanation: He + wasn't. Phủ định của He was = He wasn't.

questions.question: The restaurant _____ empty when we arrived.
questions.explanation: The restaurant = It, ngôi thứ ba số ít → was.

questions.question: Từ 'crowded' nghĩa là gì?
questions.explanation: 'Crowded' có nghĩa là đông đúc, đông người.

questions.question: Câu nào SAI?
options: She was nervous before the exam.
We were surprised by the result.
He were late for the meeting.
questions.explanation: He → was, không phải were. 'He were' là sai.

questions.question: How _____ your weekend?
questions.explanation: How was your weekend? = Cuối tuần của bạn thế nào? (your weekend = It)

questions.question: It _____ wonderful! (trả lời 'How was your weekend?')
questions.explanation: It → was. Mô tả trạng thái trong quá khứ.

questions.question: The hotel room _____ very comfortable.
questions.explanation: The hotel room = It → was.

questions.question: Từ 'upset' nghĩa là gì?
questions.explanation: 'Upset' có nghĩa là buồn bực, không hài lòng, khó chịu.

questions.question: She _____ alone at home all evening.
questions.explanation: She → was.

questions.question: The library _____ quiet and peaceful.
questions.explanation: The library = It → was.

questions.question: _____ the students ready for the exam?
questions.explanation: The students = They → Were the students...?

questions.question: He _____ early and had to wait for everyone.
questions.explanation: He → was.

questions.question: Từ 'terrible' nghĩa là gì?
questions.explanation: 'Terrible' có nghĩa là kinh khủng, tệ hại.

questions.question: The traffic _____ terrible this morning.
questions.explanation: The traffic = It → was.

questions.question: Câu hỏi ĐÚNG: 'Bạn có ở nhà tối qua không?'
options: Was you at home last night?
Were you at home last night?
Did you was at home last night?
Were you being at home last night?
questions.explanation: Were + you + adj/adverb? Câu hỏi với be quá khứ.

questions.question: The journey _____ long but comfortable.
questions.explanation: The journey = It → was.

questions.question: Từ 'proud' nghĩa là gì?
questions.explanation: 'Proud' có nghĩa là tự hào.

questions.question: The street _____ too noisy to sleep.
questions.explanation: The street = It → was.

questions.question: Từ 'comfortable' nghĩa là gì?
questions.explanation: 'Comfortable' có nghĩa là thoải mái, tiện nghi.

questions.question: Câu nào ĐÚNG về cách dùng was/were?
options: He were at home all day.
questions.explanation: I → was. 'You was', 'We was', 'He were' đều sai.

questions.question: _____ she late for the meeting this morning?
questions.explanation: She → Was she...? Câu hỏi với be quá khứ.

questions.question: They _____ disappointed with the result. (phủ định)
questions.explanation: They + weren't. Phủ định của They were = They weren't.

questions.question: Từ 'exciting' nghĩa là gì?
questions.explanation: 'Exciting' có nghĩa là hứng thú, hồi hộp (sự kiện/trải nghiệm).

questions.question: The football match _____ very exciting.
questions.explanation: The football match = It → was.

questions.question: Từ 'available' nghĩa là gì?
questions.explanation: 'Available' có nghĩa là có sẵn hoặc rảnh (không bận).

questions.question: Chọn câu dịch đúng: 'Buổi diễn thật nhàm chán đến nỗi tôi ngủ gật.'
options: The lecture is so boring that I fell asleep.
The lecture was so boring that I fell asleep.
The lecture were so boring that I fell asleep.
The lecture was so boring that I fall asleep.
questions.explanation: The lecture = It → was. fell asleep = ngủ gật (quá khứ của fall).
